history.en: The Nebelung may have a reserved nature, but she loves to play (being especially fond of retrieving) and enjoys jumping or climbing to high places where she can study people and situations at her leisure before making up her mind about whether she wants to get involved.
history.zh: The Nebelung may have a reserved nature, but she loves to play (being especially fond of retrieving) and enjoys jumping or climbing to high places where she can study people and situations at her leisure before making up her mind about whether she wants to get involved.
